---

## Source
- Spec: `specs/001-add-task/spec.md`
- BR: BR-001 — Allow users to add tasks to their personal todo list
- Use Cases: UC-01 — Add a new task

---

## Technical Architecture

### Navigation
Expo Router, single route `app/index.tsx`. No navigation needed for this feature — the add-task UI is on the main screen itself.

### Component Tree
```
app/index.tsx (main screen)
  └── TaskInput                        testID="task_input"
      └── TextInput (placeholder: "What needs to be done?")
      └── TouchableOpacity ("+")       testID="add_button"
  └── FlatList                         testID="task_list"
      └── TaskRow                      testID="task_row_{task.id}"
          └── TouchableOpacity         testID="task_checkbox"
          └── Text (task.title)
```

### Data Flow
1. User types into `TaskInput` TextInput → local `useState` in `app/index.tsx`
2. User taps `add_button` → calls `dispatch({ type: 'ADD_TASK', title })`
3. Reducer creates a `Task` object with UUID and `createdAt`
4. Side effect calls `db.insertTask(task)` (SQLite write)
5. State updates → `task_list` re-renders with the new `TaskRow` at top
6. Input clears via local state reset

### Storage
Single table `tasks` in expo-sqlite. Service at `src/services/db.ts`. Schema created on first launch via migration.

```
CREATE TABLE tasks (
  id        TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title     TEXT NOT NULL,
  completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL
);
```

## testID Inventory
<!-- Derived from e2e/flows/add-task/**/*.yaml                        -->
<!-- Every testID listed here MUST appear in the implementation.     -->

| testID | Element | Used in |
|---|---|---|
| `task_input` | TextInput | AC-1, AC-2, AC-3, AC-4 |
| `add_button` | TouchableOpacity | AC-1, AC-2, AC-3, AC-4 |
| `task_list` | FlatList | AC-1, AC-4 |
| `task_checkbox` | TouchableOpacity (inside TaskRow) | AC-2, AC-3 |
| `task_row_{task.id}` | View (TaskRow wrapper) | runtime — used with UUID |

## File Structure
```
src/
  types/
    task.ts
  services/
    db.ts
  context/
    TaskContext.tsx
  hooks/
    useTasks.ts
  components/
    TaskInput.tsx
    TaskRow.tsx
    TaskList.tsx
app/
  index.tsx
```

---

## Dependencies
- `expo-sqlite@~15.2.0` — SQLite persistence (compatible with Expo SDK 56)
- `expo-router@~6.0.0` — File-based navigation

---

## Open Technical Decisions
<!-- Resolved from spec.md Open Questions section.                   -->
- Q-1 (vision): Task ordering → newest-first (ORDER BY created_at DESC)
- Q-2 (vision): Storage backend → expo-sqlite
- Q-3 (vision): Delete confirmation → no confirmation (one-tap)
